subject: fix(styling): set html background to dark theme color for mobile landscape
body:
The html element had no background color set, defaulting to white. On mobile
devices in landscape orientation, the safe area inset padding on body exposed
this white background as a visible strip along the notch/cutout side.

Tags: styling, mobile, safe-area
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: mobile-ux
Semver: patch
